summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of the Remote Branch Printing Terminal feature. All 39 backend API tests passed. Two bugs were found and fixed in the frontend. /print-center page loads and works correctly. Remote Print button in InvoiceDetailModal now opens SendToPrintModal successfully after fixes.

ui_bugs.issue: SendToPrintModal was missing from the compact mode return block (lines 420-777). It was only present in the full-width mode (lines 782+). Clicking 'Remote Print' button set sendToPrintOpen=true but modal never rendered. FIXED by adding SendToPrintModal to compact mode return block (after ViewQRDialog).

Called PrintEngine.getHtml() but the correct function name is PrintEngine.generateHtml(). This caused runtime crash: '_lib_PrintEngine_.default.getHtml is not a function'. FIXED by changing to PrintEngine.generateHtml().
ui_bugs.selector: N/A — runtime error on modal mount

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend webpack compilation failed with 'Cannot read properties of null (reading traverse)' at ImportDeclaration visitor in Emergent's visual-edits babel plugin. Root cause: plugin called importPath.parentPath.parentPath.traverse() but parentPath.parentPath is null (ImportDeclaration at Program level). FIXED by adding null guard: const searchPath = importPath.parentPath?.parentPath ?? importPath.parentPath

integration_issues.flow: SendToPrintModal — no terminals for regression branch
integration_issues.issue: Expected behavior: regression test org invoices belong to 'Main Warehouse' branch which has no registered terminals. Modal correctly shows 'No print terminals registered for this branch. Go to Print Center to set one up.'

issues: Job rows are missing data-testid='print-job-row-{id}' attributes — makes automated testing harder but not a functional issue

action_items: No remaining action items — all critical bugs were fixed and verified
critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceDetailModal.js has two separate render paths (compact ~line 420 and full-width ~line 782). Any new modal/dialog added to InvoiceDetailModal must be placed in BOTH render paths. This structural pattern is error-prone — consider refactoring to shared sub-modals or a single render path.

PrintEngine.getHtml() was referenced but does not exist — only PrintEngine.generateHtml() exists. The non-existent method reference should have caused a build-time warning but did not because it's a runtime-only error.
frontend/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js line 936 had a null-dereference bug that crashed webpack compilation when processing TerminalShell.jsx. Added null guard to prevent recurrence.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after fixes (Print Center page, Remote Print button, SendToPrintModal, sidebar nav all working)

test_credentials.admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325 (Platform Admin — no tenant data)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created ~12 TEST- prefixed print jobs (TEST-INV-001, TEST-OFFLINE-001, TEST-SINGLE-001, TEST-STATUS-001, TEST-FAILED-001, TEST-RESEND-001, TEST-RESEND-PRINTED, TEST-LIST-001). These appear in the Print Center active queue and history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Remote Branch Printing Terminal feature is fully working. All /api/print/* endpoints pass 39 tests. The /print-center page loads with terminal grid, mode toggle, print queue, and history tabs. InvoiceDetailModal Remote Print button opens SendToPrintModal. Three bugs were found and fixed: (1) babel plugin null-dereference blocking frontend compilation, (2) SendToPrintModal missing from compact modal path, (3) PrintEngine.getHtml() → generateHtml() typo. The test terminals are all offline so print jobs go to pending status. The SendToPrintModal shows 'no terminals for branch' for regression test org invoices (those branches have no registered terminals).

babel_plugin_crash.root_cause: ImportDeclaration nodes at Program level have parentPath=Program and parentPath.parentPath=null. The plugin called .traverse() on null.
babel_plugin_crash.fix: Added null coalescing: const searchPath = importPath.parentPath?.parentPath ?? importPath.parentPath
babel_plugin_crash.reproduction: Any JSX file with a default-exported component that uses a new library import (like PrintBridge) triggers the ImportDeclaration visitor with program-level imports

send_to_print_modal_missing.root_cause: InvoiceDetailModal has two render paths: compact (lines 420-777, returns early) and full-width (lines 782+). SendToPrintModal was only added to the full-width path. The compact path returned at line 776 before reaching the SendToPrintModal JSX.
send_to_print_modal_missing.fix: Added SendToPrintModal JSX block inside compact mode return (after ViewQRDialog at line 735)
send_to_print_modal_missing.reproduction: Click any invoice in Sales History → compact modal opens → click Remote Print → setSendToPrintOpen(true) but modal never mounts

print_engine_typo.root_cause: Called PrintEngine.getHtml() but the method is named PrintEngine.generateHtml(). Runtime TypeError on modal render.
